RULING:
PLAINTIFF LOUIS BLAZEJEWSKI'S MOTION TO ADVANCE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as amended: Plaintiff's motion to advance current trial date with preference is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to meet the requirements of C.C.P. 36(a). Plaintiff did not demonstrate good cause as to why advancing the current trial date is necessary to avoid prejudicing his interest in the litigation. The Court further vacated the trial date of February 10, 2014 and set an expedited trial date on January 21, 2014 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Plaintiff is allowed to bring an ex parte application to advance the trial date if the circumstances changed. Plaintiff to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L.
